vectors.chunk: Employees receive a yearly wellness allowance of $500.
Dental and vision coverage are included in the insurance plan.
Employees receive 25 days of paid leave per year.
Unused leave can be carried forward for one year.
Employees are allowed to work remotely two days per week.
Medical insurance covers employees and their immediate family.
Employees must complete cybersecurity training every year.
Company laptops should not be shared with non-employees.
Employees must follow the code of conduct policy.
